title: [ExportVerilog] Replace `.` in names with `_`
body:
~In LowerToRTL, temporary wires are created with `.` inside them.  When
these names are emitted in ExportVerilog, every `.` is replaced with
`2E`.  This makes the output look buggy, when there is nothing wrong.
This PR switches to use `_GEN_` prefixed wire names, which is similar to
what the Scala FIRRTL compiler does.  This is not necessarily the
stopping point for choosing generated names, just a small improvement
over what we currently use.~
